meta.name: Neon Edge Gaming
meta.description: A high-contrast, dark-themed e-commerce store focused on premium electronics and gaming gear. The aesthetic is bold, aggressive, and highly visual, utilizing full-width hero imagery, dramatic lighting on products, and signature accent colors against black backgrounds to create a highly immersive, tech-forward shopping experience.

fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
fonts.serif: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

header.notes: Minimal black header with a bright green centered logo. Hamburger menu icon on the left, search and cart icons on the right.

footer.description: Store tagline in signature accent color located above the social icons.
footer.notes: Four-column link layout (Shop, Explore, Support, Company). Fifth column for Follow Us with circular social icons. Copyright and legal links in a thin bottom bar separated by a subtle border.

productCard.notes: No traditional product cards are visible in this design; the layout relies entirely on large featured image blocks acting as entry points to categories or specific products.

productGrid.notes: The lower half of the page uses a 50/50 split grid for promotional blocks, almost seamless with very thin gaps.

featuredProducts.label: Featured items text
featuredProducts.heading: Featured product heading
featuredProducts.notes: Full width or 50/50 split image blocks acting as massive featured product links.

sections.name: hero-collaboration
sections.layout: Full-width single column, text overlay centered at the top.

design.background: Light blue gradient sky with fluffy 3D clouds.
design.text: Large black bold display heading, smaller black sub-heading. Black text links with arrows.
design.styling: No borders, full bleed edge-to-edge image.

content.headline: Collaboration Brand Name in Bold
content.body: Short descriptive tagline about the collaboration aesthetic.

media.description: Two light-blue/white gaming chairs featuring a cute cloud dog character, positioned side-by-side in front of a cartoonish sky background.

sections.notes: A surprisingly bright and soft hero section contrasting with the rest of the dark site, clearly highlighting a specific brand collaboration.

sections.name: featured-product-mouse
sections.layout: Full-width single column, text overlay centered at the top.

design.background: Dark, moody vignette background, darker at edges, slightly lighter center.
design.text: White bold display heading, white sub-heading. Green text links with arrows.
design.styling: No borders, full bleed edge-to-edge image.

content.headline: Product Name in Bold Uppercase
content.body: Short punchy tagline about product capability.
content.cta: Two simple text links with green accent arrows (e.g. 'Learn More >', 'Buy >')

media.description: Two sleek gaming mice (one black, one white) hovering vertically next to each other against a dark studio background with subtle underlighting.

sections.name: featured-collaboration-pink
sections.layout: Full-width single column, text overlay centered at the top.

design.background: Dark background with intense pink glowing smoke/light effects from the bottom.
design.text: White bold display heading, white sub-heading. Red badge at top. Green text link with arrow.
design.styling: No borders, full bleed edge-to-edge image.

content.headline: Music Group Collaboration Name
content.cta: Single text link with green accent arrow (e.g. 'Learn More >')

media.description: A collection of bright pink gaming gear (chair, keyboard, mouse, mousepad, headset) stacked together, illuminated by dramatic pink stage lighting.

content.specialElements: Red 'SOLD OUT' badge above the main heading.

sections.notes: High contrast between the pink products and dark background.

sections.name: split-promo-chairs-kombat
sections.layout: 2 equal columns side-by-side, seamless or very thin dark gap.

design.background: Left: Dark moody gradient. Right: Dark moody cinematic scene.
design.text: White headings, subheadings, and green arrow text links.
design.styling: Image blocks filling their respective containers.

content.headline: Left: Category Promo. Right: Movie Tie-in Promo
content.body: Left: Promotional offer text. Right: Call to action text relating to a movie.
content.cta: Simple text links with green accent arrows in each block.

media.description: Left: Three dark ergonomic gaming chairs. Right: Movie poster style collage of characters with a branded gaming controller box.

sections.notes: Transition from full-width horizontal banners to vertical square/portrait banners.

sections.name: split-promo-laptops-atlas
sections.layout: 2 equal columns side-by-side, seamless or very thin dark gap.

design.background: Left: Dark vignette with bright neon green/blue glowing screen light. Right: Pure black/very dark subtle gradient.
design.text: White headings, subheadings, and green arrow text links. Orange badge on left.
design.styling: Image blocks filling their respective containers.

content.headline: Left: New Laptop Model. Right: New Mousepad Model
content.body: Left: Descriptive adjectives for laptop. Right: Tagline about a glass surface.
content.cta: Simple text links with green accent arrows in each block.

media.description: Left: A sleek open laptop showing a bright neon green abstract wallpaper, sitting in a dark blue/green neon lit environment. Right: A very thin, glowing white rectangular sheet (glass mousepad) floating in deep black space.

content.specialElements: Yellow 'ONLY AT [STORE NAME]' badge on the left block.

sections.name: split-promo-audio-intel
sections.layout: 2 equal columns side-by-side, seamless or very thin dark gap.

design.background: Left: Black with subtle spotlight effect. Right: Dark blue/black cityscape night scene.
design.text: White headings, subheadings, and green arrow text links.
design.styling: Image blocks filling their respective containers.

content.headline: Left: Earbud Model Name. Right: Processor Brand Promo
content.body: Left: Tagline about audio latency and immersion. Right: Promo tagline linking a processor brand and a superhero game.
content.cta: Simple text links with green accent arrows in each block.

media.description: Left: Black wireless earbuds floating above their open charging case, which has a rainbow RGB light strip. Right: A laptop showing a neon green wallpaper next to a superhero figure and a branded logo graphic against a dark rainy city backdrop.

sections.notes: Consistent typography and link styling across all diverse image blocks unifies the chaotic imagery.
